common.metaDescription: An AI-powered job matching platform for Swedish job seekers. Upload a CV, search jobs, and generate cover letters.

landing.subtitle: Upload your CV. We extract your skills, match you with jobs from Arbetsförmedlingen, and generate tailored cover letters.
landing.howItWorksSubtitle: Upload. Match. Apply. Three simple steps.

upload.title: Upload your CV
upload.description: AI reads your CV and extracts your skills so you don’t have to enter them manually.

search.title: Find matching jobs
search.description: Search Arbetsförmedlingen’s full job database, filtered and ranked by your skills.

generate.title: Generate cover letters
generate.description: Get a personalized cover letter for each job, based on your CV and the job listing.

auth.signInDescription: Enter your email to receive a magic link
auth.checkEmailDescription: We sent a magic link to {email}. Click the link to sign in.
auth.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address
auth.signUpDescription: Enter your email and create a password
auth.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.resetPasswordDescription: Enter your email and we will send you a reset link.
auth.resetEmailSentDescription: We sent a password reset link to {email}.
auth.updatePasswordDescription: Choose a new password for your account.
auth.resetLinkInvalidDescription: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
auth.signUpCheckEmailDescription: We sent a verification link to {email}. Click the link to verify your account.
auth.signUpRateLimited: Too many attempts. Please wait a few minutes and try again.
auth.signUpEmailFailed: Could not send verification email. Please try again later.

upgradeCard.included: Your Free plan includes 1 cover letter and 3 skill extractions per month.
upgradeCard.valueProp: Pro lets you generate letters for every job you apply to, plus AI-powered CV reviews and rewrites.

proWelcome.title: You're on Pro - let's unlock your first wins.

dashboard.documentDialogDescription: Review and edit the text we use to match jobs and generate cover letters.
dashboard.replaceDocumentDescription: Upload a new file to replace your current document.

skills.title: Your Skills
skills.noSkills: No skills extracted yet. Upload a CV to get started.
skills.addPlaceholder: Type a skill and press Enter

letterGuidance.title: Default guidance for generated letters
letterGuidance.description: Add reusable pointers for how your personal letters should sound. You can still override this per job.
letterGuidance.placeholder: Example: Keep the tone concise and practical, mention teamwork and warehouse safety.
letterGuidance.hint: This default is applied to future generated letters unless you override it on a job listing.

prompt.title: Welcome to your dashboard!
prompt.description: Here you can manage documents, skills, saved jobs, and generated letters. Want a detailed walkthrough?

controls.outsideClickHint: Use Next or Skip to continue.

completionToast.title: Nice! You finished the guide.
completionToast.description: You’re officially dangerous now. Go hunt some jobs.

nav.title: Top navigation overview
nav.description: This top bar is your main navigation between Dashboard and Jobs.

navJobs.title: Jobs button
navJobs.description: Use this button when you want to search new listings or open your saved jobs tab.

quickLinks.title: Dashboard quick links
quickLinks.description: Use these shortcuts to open CV Studio, your letters, and settings.

quickCvStudio.title: CV Studio shortcut
quickCvStudio.description: Open CV Studio from here when you want AI feedback and editing for your CV.

quickLetters.title: Letters shortcut
quickLetters.description: Open your generated letters from this quick link.

quickSettings.title: Settings shortcut
quickSettings.description: Open Settings to change language and default guidance.

navLetters.title: Brev / Letters button
navLetters.description: This takes you to generated letters so you can review and reuse them.

language.title: Language switcher
language.description: Switch between Swedish and English at any time from this control.

documents.title: Documents section
documents.description: Your CV and personal letter live here. Open cards to review and edit content.

uploadNew.title: Upload new file button
uploadNew.description: Use "Upload New" to replace your current document with a newer version.

editDocument.title: Edit document flow
editDocument.description: Click a document card, then choose Edit in the dialog to update parsed text before matching.

skills.title: Skills editor
skills.description: These skills drive matching quality across searches and ranking.

skillsAdd.title: Add skills
skillsAdd.description: Click "Add skill", type a skill, and press Enter to include it.

skillsRemove.title: Remove skills
skillsRemove.description: Hover a skill chip and click the X button to remove it.

savedJobs.title: Saved jobs panel
savedJobs.description: If you have saved jobs, they appear here with quick access back to listings.

helpButton.title: Guide controls
helpButton.description: Use this question mark anytime to replay this guide or restart onboarding.

goToJobs.title: Go to Jobs via top navigation
goToJobs.description: Now click the Jobs button in the top bar. We will continue the walkthrough there.

navJobs.title: Jobs page confirmed
navJobs.description: Great. You are now on Jobs where all searching and saving happens.

searchBar.title: How to search
searchBar.description: Type keywords, role names, tools, or industries. Add a region if you want location hints.

keywordTips.title: Keyword input tips
keywordTips.description: Use short focused terms first, then refine. Example: "lager", "truck", "administration".

skillsMode.title: Skills-only search mode
skillsMode.description: If you keep keyword empty and use selected skills, search runs per skill to broaden discovery.

keywordRanking.title: Keyword + skill ranking
keywordRanking.description: When you search with keywords, results are still sorted using skill matching signals where possible.

savedTab.title: Sparade / Saved tab
savedTab.description: Open this tab to find jobs you saved earlier and return to them quickly.

savedList.title: Saved jobs access
savedList.description: If you have saved jobs, they appear here and can be opened or removed.

openListing.title: Open a listing
openListing.description: Open any job card to view full details. We will continue the guide on that listing page.

actions.title: Listing action area
actions.description: From here you can save this job and generate a personalized letter.

guidance.title: Custom generation pointers
guidance.description: Write your own prompt pointers here (tone, focus, examples) before generating.

generate.title: Generate personalized letter
generate.description: Go ahead — this one won’t count against your Free plan quota 😉 Generate once to unlock the next step.

viewLetters.title: Open your new letter
viewLetters.description: After you generate, a link appears here to open your letters for this job.

letters.title: Brev button
letters.description: Use the Brev/Letters button in top nav to review generated letters.

language.title: Language switch reminder
language.description: You can switch interface language anytime while keeping your data intact.

replay.title: Guide completed
replay.description: You can replay this guide or redo onboarding anytime from the question mark button.

overview.title: Your generated letters
overview.description: This page collects your generated letters so you can review, copy, and reuse them.

copy.title: Copy a letter
copy.description: Use Copy to put the full letter on your clipboard, then paste it into your application.

language.title: Switch language
language.description: Swap between Swedish and English any time. This does not affect your stored data.

guidance.title: Default letter guidance
guidance.description: Set reusable guidance so future letters follow your preferred tone and focus.

jobs.title: Search Jobs
jobs.searchPlaceholderUnified: Search by job title, skill, or keyword...
jobs.sortHintBestMatch: Auto-sorted by matched skills (most matches first).
jobs.filtersDescription: Narrow down results without changing your search.

searchStatus.searchingFoundPending: Found {count} jobs so far ({pending} searches left)...
searchStatus.noResults: No jobs found matching your search

jobs.noResults: No jobs found. Try a different search term.
jobs.enterSearch: Enter a search term or select skills to find jobs
jobs.noSkillsFound: No skills found. Upload a CV and extract skills first.
jobs.noJobSkills: No skills found for this job
jobs.skillSearchPartialFailure: Some skill searches failed ({count}). Showing partial results.
jobs.errorNoSearchTerm: Please enter a search term or select skills
jobs.errorSelectSkill: Please select at least one skill
jobs.savedJobsDescription: Jobs you've saved appear here so you can revisit them anytime.
jobs.savedJobsCount: {count, plural, =0 {No saved jobs} =1 {1 saved job} other {# saved jobs}}
jobs.savedJobsEmpty: No saved jobs yet. Save jobs from search results.
jobs.savedJobsSomeUnavailable: Some saved jobs are no longer available

actions.viewLettersForJob: {count, plural, one {View letter for this job} other {View letters for this job (#)}}
actions.guidanceLabel: Optional pointers for your cover letter (can be left blank)
actions.guidancePlaceholder: Example: Keep the cover letter concise, highlight relevant experience, and mirror the job ad’s requirements.
actions.guidanceHelp: You don’t need to add anything. If you do, it’s only used for this cover letter generation.
actions.quotaExceededTitle: You've used your free letter this month
actions.quotaValueProp: With Pro, you can generate a tailored letter for every job you find — up to 200/month.

letters.title: Generated Letters
letters.empty: No letters generated yet. Search for jobs and generate personal letters.
letters.emptyForJob: No letters generated for this job yet.
letters.aiAdapted: Personal Letter AI-adapted for this job
letters.editDialogDescription: Update the letter text directly or provide a follow-up prompt for AI refinement.
letters.followUpPromptPlaceholder: Example: Keep it factual, but make the tone warmer and more concise.
letters.honeProOnly: AI honing is available for Pro users only.

welcome.greeting: Hi! I'm your job search companion. Let's get you set up — it only takes a few minutes.

documents.guide: Upload your CV so I can extract your skills and match you to relevant jobs. Personal letter is optional.
documents.cvPrompt: Upload your CV and I'll analyze it to find jobs that match your experience.
documents.letterPrompt: If you have a personal letter, I can use it as a reference for your writing style. This is optional.
documents.tip: You can replace these anytime from your dashboard.
documents.replayChoiceGuide: Use your existing CV or upload a new one for this onboarding replay.

skills.found: I found these skills in your CV. On the Jobs page, you'll search using these — so make sure they look right.
skills.guide: These skills power your job matching. Tweak them now so your searches and highlights feel accurate.
skills.tip: Tip: If you update your CV later, regenerate skills from the dashboard. You can always edit skills manually too.

jobs.searching: Let me search for jobs matching your skills.
jobs.results: Save jobs you like — you can generate personalized cover letters for them later.
jobs.guide: This is the same Jobs search you'll use later. Try searching with your skills, add a keyword if you want, and save a few jobs to your shortlist.
jobs.tip: Tip: Use the Saved tab to revisit your shortlist and generate letters later.
jobs.seeMore: See more on the Jobs page
jobs.noResults: No jobs found for these skills yet. Try adjusting your skills or check the Jobs page later.

completion.message: You're all set! Here's what you can do now:
completion.tip: Come back anytime to update your CV, manage skills, or generate new letters.

tips.editCv: Edit or replace your CV anytime from the dashboard.
tips.regenerateSkills: After you update your CV, regenerate skills from the dashboard for better matching.
tips.saveJobs: Save jobs to build a shortlist you can return to.
tips.generateLetters: Generate tailored cover letters from your saved jobs when you're ready.

completion.freePlanNote: You're on the Free plan — generate your first cover letter and see the magic. Want more? Pro is always here.

cvStudio.title: CV Studio
cvStudio.subtitle: Upload your CV, target saved jobs, and get AI feedback with one-click rewrites.
cvStudio.uploadDescription: Once a CV is available, you can generate feedback and apply AI edits.
cvStudio.noCvContent: No extracted text found for this CV. Upload again or edit the text.
cvStudio.targetsDescription: Pick one or more saved jobs to steer feedback toward those descriptions.
cvStudio.noSavedJobs: No saved jobs yet. Feedback will run in generic improvement mode.
cvStudio.directivesPlaceholder: Example: Prioritize logistics, customer communication, and measurable impact.
cvStudio.directivesHint: You can leave this blank. Selected jobs are optional too.
cvStudio.proUnlockedFeedback: AI feedback pinpoints CV gaps against your target jobs.
cvStudio.proUnlockedEdits: AI rewrites apply stronger phrasing in one click.
cvStudio.lockDescription: With Pro, AI reviews your CV against the jobs you're targeting and suggests concrete improvements. Then apply those changes with one click.

controls.outsideClickHint: Use Next or Skip to continue.

currentCv.title: Your CV
currentCv.description: Review your current CV text here and upload a new version any time.

targets.title: Target saved jobs
targets.description: Optionally select saved jobs to steer feedback toward relevant requirements.

feedback.title: Generate feedback
feedback.description: Generate CV feedback, then apply AI edits when you're ready (PRO required).

pricing.title: Find work faster
pricing.subtitle: Free gets you started. Pro gives you the tools to stand out.
pricing.freeDescription: Try everything, with limited monthly usage.
pricing.proDescription: Serious about your job search? Get the full toolkit.
pricing.generateLetterDesc: AI writes a personalized cover letter for each job, using your CV and the listing.
pricing.skillsExtractDesc: We read your CV and pull out your key skills so jobs can be matched automatically.
pricing.skillsBatchDesc: Re-extract skills from all your CVs at once when you upload a new version.
pricing.cvFeedbackDesc: AI reviews your CV against specific job listings and shows what to improve.
pricing.cvEditDesc: One-click CV improvements — AI applies the suggested changes for you.
pricing.checkoutCanceledDescription: No worries - your payment was not completed. You can try again whenever you're ready.

billingSuccess.title: Welcome to Pro
billingSuccess.subtitle: Your payment is complete and your Pro plan is active.
billingSuccess.guideStep1: Open CV Studio and generate a first feedback report.
billingSuccess.guideStep2: Apply AI edits and save your improved CV.
billingSuccess.guideStep3: Generate tailored letters for your saved jobs.
billingSuccess.activationStepUseCvAi: Generate CV feedback or apply AI edits
billingSuccess.pendingDescription: Your account is being upgraded right now.
billingSuccess.pendingHint: This usually takes a few seconds. Refresh to check your current status.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your language and default generation preferences.
settings.languageDescription: Switch interface language for your account experience.
settings.billingDescription: Manage your Pro subscription and eligibility.
settings.billingCountryHint: Required to purchase Pro during the Sweden-only launch.
settings.guidesDescription: Replay the full product guide or onboarding whenever you need a refresher.
settings.usageDescription: How much of your monthly AI quota you've used so far.
settings.usageProNote: Need more? Pro gives you up to 200 letters, 300 extractions, and full CV Studio access.
settings.dangerZoneDescription: Delete your account and permanently remove your data.
settings.deleteAccountDescription: This permanently deletes your account, documents, saved jobs, and generated letters.
settings.deleteAccountBlockedBody: Please cancel your subscription first to avoid being billed after deleting your account.
settings.deleteAccountConfirmBody: This action is irreversible. It will delete your account and all associated data.

service.title: 1. What the Service Is
service.body: JobbJägaren is an AI-powered job matching platform for Swedish job seekers. We help you upload CVs, extract skills, find matching jobs from Arbetsförmedlingen (the Swedish Employment Agency), and generate personalized cover letters using AI.

accounts.title: 2. Account Responsibility
accounts.body: You are responsible for maintaining the security of your account credentials and for all activity that occurs under your account. You must provide accurate information when creating your account. You may not use the service for any unlawful purpose.

billing.title: 3. Plans and Billing
billing.body: JobbJägaren offers a Free plan with limited monthly usage and a Pro plan at SEK 99/month (including VAT). Pro subscriptions are billed monthly through Stripe, auto-renew each billing cycle, and can be cancelled at any time from your account settings. Upon cancellation, you retain Pro access until the end of the current billing period. Refunds are not provided for partial billing periods. Pro is currently available to users in Sweden only.

acceptableUse.title: 4. Acceptable Use
acceptableUse.body: You may not use the service to submit fraudulent job applications, generate misleading content, harass employers or other users, or attempt to circumvent usage limits. Automated access or scraping of the service is not permitted without prior written consent.

aiDisclaimer.title: 5. AI-Generated Content
aiDisclaimer.body: Cover letters, CV feedback, and other AI-generated outputs are suggestions only. They are not guaranteed to be accurate, complete, or suitable for any particular purpose. You are responsible for reviewing and editing all generated content before use. JobbJägaren does not guarantee that using the service will result in employment.

thirdPartyData.title: 6. Third-Party Data
thirdPartyData.body: Job listings are sourced from Arbetsförmedlingen's public API. We do not control or guarantee the accuracy, completeness, or availability of this data. Job listings may be removed or changed by Arbetsförmedlingen at any time without notice.

liability.title: 7. Limitation of Liability
liability.body: JobbJägaren is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. To the maximum extent permitted by law, we are not liable for any indirect, incidental, or consequential damages arising from your use of the service, including but not limited to lost opportunities, data loss, or inaccuracies in AI-generated content.

changes.title: 8. Changes to These Terms
changes.body: We may update these terms from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or a notice within the service. Continued use of the service after changes take effect constitutes acceptance of the updated terms.

contact.title: 9. Contact
contact.body: For questions about these terms, contact us at carlelelid@outlook.com. Business entity: Carl Elelid Enskild Firma.

dataCollected.title: 1. What Data We Collect
dataCollected.body: We collect the following personal data: email address and name (at sign-up), uploaded CVs and personal letters (document content and extracted text), extracted skills (parsed from your documents), saved job references (Arbetsförmedlingen job IDs), and AI-generated cover letters and CV feedback.

howWeUse.title: 2. How We Use Your Data
howWeUse.body: Your data is used to: match you with relevant job listings based on your skills, generate personalized cover letters and CV feedback using AI, manage your account and subscription, and improve the service. We do not sell your personal data to third parties.

thirdParty.title: 3. Third-Party Processors
thirdParty.body: We use the following third-party services to operate JobbJägaren: Supabase (database hosting, authentication, and file storage — EU region), Google Gemini (AI processing for content generation — your CV text and job descriptions are sent to Google's API), Stripe (payment processing for Pro subscriptions — Stripe receives your email and payment details), and Arbetsförmedlingen (public job listings API — no personal data is shared with them).

retention.title: 4. Data Retention
retention.body: Your data is retained as long as your account is active. If you delete your account, all personal data including documents, skills, saved jobs, and generated letters are permanently removed. Stripe may retain transaction records as required by law.

rights.title: 5. Your Rights (GDPR)
rights.body: Under the EU General Data Protection Regulation, you have the right to: access your personal data, correct inaccurate data, request deletion of your data, export your data (data portability), object to processing, and withdraw consent at any time. To exercise these rights, contact us at carlelelid@outlook.com or delete your account from the Settings page.

deletion.title: 6. Account Deletion
deletion.body: You can delete your account and all associated data from the Settings page. This action is irreversible and removes all your documents, skills, saved jobs, generated letters, and account information.

cookies.title: 7. Cookies
cookies.body: JobbJägaren uses only essential cookies required for authentication and session management. We do not use tracking cookies, analytics cookies, or third-party advertising cookies.

contact.title: 8. Contact
contact.body: For privacy-related questions or to exercise your GDPR rights, contact us at carlelelid@outlook.com. Business entity: Carl Elelid Enskild Firma.

changes.title: 9. Changes to This Policy
changes.body: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. Material changes will be communicated via email or a notice within the service. The effective date at the top of this page indicates when the policy was last updated.

upload.dropCV: Drag and drop or click to upload CV (PDF, DOCX, or TXT)
upload.dropPersonalLetter: Drag and drop or click to upload Personal Letter (PDF, DOCX, or TXT)
upload.invalidType: File must be PDF, DOCX, or TXT
